title: PUSD stablecoin deploys on ADI Chain, targeting $3T Islamic finance market
message_html: PUSD stablecoin deploys on ADI Chain, targeting $3T Islamic finance market ...
snippet: The Shariah-compliant stablecoin backed by Gulf currencies expands to a new Layer 2 network aimed at institutional settlement in the Middle East.

title: Banking group asks for more time to comment on US stablecoin bill
message_html: Banking group asks for more time to comment on US stablecoin bill ...
snippet: The letter to four US government agencies said banks needed 60 more days for comment after OCC stablecoin rulemaking had been finalized.
